description:
A new way to collaborate

Empowering teams by messenger, meetings, calendar, docs, and emails. It's all in one place.
Feishu Aily
- Feishu Aily has been upgraded to become your dedicated Aily Agent, available as a persistent contact in Feishu and deeply integrated into your daily workflow. It understands your work context, retains memory, offers proactive assistance, and continuously improves over time. The more you use it, the better it understands you. Visit aily.feishu.cn to schedule activation.
- You can also use Feishu Aily Pro, an advanced AI productivity tool designed for professional scenarios. It supports complex task handling and professional content creation. Deeply integrated with Feishu, Feishu Aily Pro works within your organizational workflows and can autonomously analyze business data from group chats, meetings, and documents.
Base
- Rich text mode is now available for formatting messages and emails sent through workflows and automations, giving you more styling options to customize your message.
- If "When a Feishu message is received" is set as the trigger for the AI agent node, you can turn on Streaming response to get the AI response in real-time as it is being generated.
- You can choose to run all qualifying branches in Multi-branch nodes to process tasks in parallel, enhancing flexibility and efficiency.
Meetings
- The transcription feature of Minutes provides various types of shortcuts for iOS devices. After you set the shortcuts, you can access the recording feature through widgets on your Home Screen or Lock Screen, as well as the Action button.
